PRPHRL_VSCLR_DEASE_IND PRPHRL_VSCLR_DEASE_IND I0900A Peripheral Vascular Disease Code CHAR 1 The code for whether the patient had a diagnosis of peripheral vascular disease (PVD). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
222 DBTC_NPHRTY_IND DBTC_NPHRTY_IND I2900C Diabetic Nephropathy Code CHAR 3 The code for whether the patient has an active diagnosis of diabetic nephropathy. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
==Not answered-voluntary
^=Skipped
223 INFLNZ_RCVD_IND INFLNZ_RCVD_IND O0250A
